_meta.purpose: Haematological neoplasm knowledge base (WHO 2022 / ICC) for the INTERPRETATION layer. No image model: the rules engine + LLM + RAG use this to interpret CBC/differential/smear/marrow findings and flags (e.g. blasts from the PBS/leukaemia detectors) toward a likely neoplasm category, its defining criteria, confirmatory tests and urgency. Decision support only; diagnosis requires morphology review + flow cytometry + cytogenetics/molecular by a haematopathologist.
_meta.source: WHO Classification of Haematolymphoid Tumours 5th ed (2022) + ICC 2022. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS; verify against current guidance.

aml.name: Acute myeloid leukaemia (AML)
criteria: ≥20% blasts in blood/marrow (or an AML-defining genetic abnormality regardless of blast %)

apl.name: Acute promyelocytic leukaemia (APL, AML with PML-RARA)
criteria: Abnormal promyelocytes + t(15;17) PML-RARA
apl.note: MEDICAL EMERGENCY: DIC/bleeding. Start ATRA on suspicion before genetic confirmation.

all.name: Acute lymphoblastic leukaemia / lymphoblastic lymphoma (ALL)
criteria: ≥20% lymphoblasts; B- or T-lineage by flow
all.note: Commonest childhood leukaemia. Ph+ (BCR-ABL1) changes therapy (add TKI).

mds.name: Myelodysplastic syndrome (MDS)
criteria: Persistent cytopenia(s) + dysplasia in ≥10% of a lineage and/or ring sideroblasts and/or MDS-defining cytogenetics; blasts <20%
mds.note: Blast % and cytogenetics/TP53 drive risk (IPSS-R). Exclude B12/folate/copper deficiency + drugs first.

mds_ebfrom.name: MDS with increased blasts (MDS-EB / MDS-IB)
criteria: Blasts 5-9% (IB1) or 10-19% (IB2) in marrow, or 2-19% in blood

mds_rs.name: MDS with ring sideroblasts / low blasts (SF3B1)
criteria: Ring sideroblasts ≥15% (or ≥5% with SF3B1); blasts <5%

cml.name: Chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML)
smear_features: marked leukocytosis with full myeloid left shift
criteria: BCR-ABL1 (Philadelphia chromosome) t(9;22) — defining
cml.note: Confirm BCR-ABL1; treat with TKI (imatinib etc.). Watch for blast phase (≥20% blasts).

pv.name: Polycythaemia vera (PV)
criteria: Raised Hb/Hct + JAK2 V617F (or exon 12) + hypercellular marrow with panmyelosis; low EPO

et.name: Essential thrombocythaemia (ET)
criteria: Platelets ≥450 x10^9/L + large mature megakaryocytes; JAK2/CALR/MPL; exclude reactive + other MPN/MDS
et.note: Exclude reactive thrombocytosis (iron deficiency, infection, inflammation).

pmf.name: Primary myelofibrosis (PMF)
criteria: Marrow fibrosis (grade 2-3) + megakaryocyte atypia; JAK2/CALR/MPL; exclude other MPN
pmf.note: Leukoerythroblastic + teardrops on film is the classic clue. Splenomegaly common.

cmml.name: Chronic myelomonocytic leukaemia (CMML)
criteria: Persistent monocytosis ≥0.5 x10^9/L and ≥10% of WBC + dysplasia; blasts <20%; no BCR-ABL1

acml.name: Atypical chronic myeloid leukaemia (aCML), BCR-ABL1-negative
criteria: Neutrophilia + dysplasia; blasts <20%; BCR-ABL1 NEGATIVE

mds_mpn_rs_t.name: MDS/MPN with ring sideroblasts and thrombocytosis (MDS/MPN-RS-T)
criteria: Ring sideroblasts + platelets ≥450 x10^9/L; often SF3B1 + JAK2

jmml.name: Juvenile myelomonocytic leukaemia (JMML)
criteria: Childhood; monocytosis + splenomegaly; RAS-pathway mutation; no BCR-ABL1

cll_sll.name: Chronic lymphocytic leukaemia / small lymphocytic lymphoma (CLL/SLL)
criteria: ≥5 x10^9/L clonal B-cells; CD5+ CD23+ CD20(dim) surface Ig(dim)
cll_sll.note: del(17p)/TP53 = adverse, avoid chemo (use targeted agents).

follicular.name: Follicular lymphoma
criteria: Follicular growth; t(14;18) BCL2-IGH
follicular.note: Indolent; watch for transformation to DLBCL.

dlbcl.name: Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL)
criteria: Diffuse large B-cells; determine COO (GCB vs ABC)
dlbcl.note: Aggressive but curable; double-hit is high-grade — urgent.

mantle_cell.name: Mantle cell lymphoma
criteria: CD5+ CD23- ; t(11;14) CCND1-IGH (cyclin D1+)

burkitt.name: Burkitt lymphoma / leukaemia
smear_features: medium blasts with deeply basophilic vacuolated cytoplasm (L3)
criteria: MYC translocation t(8;14); Ki-67 ~100%
burkitt.note: MEDICAL EMERGENCY: extremely fast-growing, tumour-lysis risk.

marginal_zone.name: Marginal zone lymphoma (incl. MALT)
criteria: Marginal-zone/MALT pattern; CD5- CD10-

hairy_cell.name: Hairy cell leukaemia
criteria: Hairy cells; BRAF V600E
hairy_cell.note: Monocytopenia is characteristic. Dry tap common.

lpl_waldenstrom.name: Lymphoplasmacytic lymphoma / Waldenström macroglobulinaemia
criteria: Lymphoplasmacytic infiltrate + IgM paraprotein; MYD88 L265P

ptcl.name: Peripheral T-cell lymphoma (PTCL)
criteria: Mature T-cell phenotype; aberrant loss of pan-T antigens
markers: CD3+ with antigen loss; clonal TCR

atll.name: Adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATLL)
criteria: HTLV-1 positive; CD4+ CD25+
atll.note: Flower cells + hypercalcaemia + HTLV-1 endemic exposure.

sezary.name: Sézary syndrome / mycosis fungoides
criteria: Erythroderma + clonal cerebriform T-cells ≥1 x10^9/L
markers: CD4+ with loss of CD7/CD26; clonal TCR

tlgl.name: T-cell large granular lymphocytic leukaemia (T-LGL)
criteria: Persistent LGL >6 months; STAT3

classic_hodgkin.name: Classic Hodgkin lymphoma
criteria: Reed-Sternberg cells; CD30+ CD15+ CD45-
classic_hodgkin.note: Nodal biopsy required (not a blood-film diagnosis). Highly curable.

nlphl.name: Nodular lymphocyte-predominant Hodgkin lymphoma (NLPHL)
criteria: LP cells CD20+ CD30- CD15-
nlphl.note: B-cell-derived; more indolent, can transform to DLBCL.

myeloma.name: Plasma cell myeloma (multiple myeloma)
smear_features: circulating plasma cells (if plasma cell leukaemia)
criteria: Clonal marrow plasma cells ≥10% or plasmacytoma + CRAB (hyperCalcaemia, Renal, Anaemia, Bone) or a myeloma-defining biomarker (≥60% PC, FLC ratio ≥100, >1 focal MRI lesion)
myeloma.note: Check calcium, creatinine, Hb, SPEP/FLC. del(17p)/t(4;14) adverse.

mgus.name: Monoclonal gammopathy of undetermined significance (MGUS)
criteria: Paraprotein <30 g/L + marrow plasma cells <10% + no CRAB/myeloma-defining event

plasma_cell_leukemia.name: Plasma cell leukaemia
smear_features: circulating plasma cells ≥20% of WBC or ≥2 x10^9/L
criteria: Circulating clonal plasma cells above threshold
